text: New addition - approach by EQT, indicative offer at £51.50, which was rejected.
New addition - formal £235.2m offer by Charterhouse Capital, 41.7% undertakings.
StoneX increases indicative offer to 110p (final offer). Board "minded to recommend".
All regulatory conditions satisfied - unconditional date expected to be 14 May 2026.
Q1 trading update - AUM fell slightly from £823.7bn to £814.4bn amid "market turbulence".
Discussions with a small number of parties who are considering making a cash offer.
